feed.title: sakkamade
feed.subtitle: through the life with yuri in heart

entry.title: Episode 17. Opposite the Darkness.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia and Rapha commenced working on a Dream Project.

entry.title: Episode 16. Dream Project.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: That night, Lydia couldn’t sleep a wink. The thoughts about Yuuyami were― not a reason.

entry.title: Episode 15. Because of That Love.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia plugged a Lightning Blade in the port upon right wrist of Yuuyami. The fastest wired interface created by humankind, how can be described Lightning Blade. As regarding wired information transmission exists no faster device than this. In prior of world’s collapse, was claimed that it should maintain top position for the following one hundred years. Via such Lightning Blade were connected Yuuyami and Ohan. Yuuyami’s right wrist to Ohan’s port on the left shoulder.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.title: Episode 13. Defective Yuuyami.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Yuuyami never dreams. Autodoll are not dream. Upon system abend, everything’s vanish. Bubbles as though. Fun days, happy moments, each and everything. However, consciousness of Yuuyami certainly was yet there. Yuuyami have no concept for where is ‘there’. Insubstantial, drifting, a very, very tiny consciousness that appeared from the darkness.

entry.title: Episode 12. All Alone.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Yuuyami collapsed backwards. Whereas her arms that were tightening Lydia, simultaneously set girl free. Several violent coughs escaped Lydia insides, before her sight grew blurred by tears. The scene scared her. Pained her. Made her believe she would break. Rather than aforesaid however, made her bewildered, not understanding a grounds of Yuuyami’ conduct.

entry.title: Episode 11. Beach Shutdown.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Lydia was driving the bike towards south. Upon tandem seat was Yuuyami, with backpack behind. Being motorcycle maintain one hundred kilometres per hour, they expect to reach seashore in thirty minutes. Ultimately, rain continued six days straight. However, Lydia didn’t complain. As the reason, she was absorbed in project of building Maker Factory. The pair instructed ten toil AD to advance construction of Maker Factory, and departed library first thing in the morning. After sea viewing, they plan to return to library at noon, get through with lunch, and head to Rapha. Approximately twenty-five minutes after pair left library. They went beyond the area of forty kilometres radius, explored afore by Yuuyami. Familiar parched​ land gradually grew to blend with different colours. Under the bed of sky-blue, vibrates olive, pea green, white and deep peach colours. That was incredible paysage. Lydia slows down and stopped motorcycle.

entry.title: Episode 10. White Map.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Today it has been raining since the morning. However not mere potsu-potsu, but zaa-zaa.1 Looked forward to sea trip Lydia, now being crestfallen and sits upon the library floor. [Potsupotsu] - spots; here and there; [Zāzā] - raining heavily; side-comment: cute; back

entry.title: Episode 9. Thinking Time.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation

entry.summary: Upon returning to underground library, Lydia enter the air shower together with Yuuyami. Air shower is the room where dirt and bacteria that stuck to clothes and body can be completely removed. Being that in order to become absolutely clean just a single minute is sufficient, before world’s collapse it was widely popularized in general households. Pushed out by trend, traditional​ bath disappeared from ordinary houses. But, I’d like to reproduce the bath someday, wished Lydia. Ambience of bath, cleansing body with foam, seemed to be very fun.

category.term: Autodoll Dreams in a Decaying World
webnovel translation
